Class BasePuzzle

java.lang.Object
item.base.BasePuzzle
Direct Known Subclasses:
Easy, Hard, Medium
public abstract class BasePuzzle extends Object
The BasePuzzle class is an abstract blueprint for all puzzle types in the game. It defines the core properties of a puzzle, such as its correct answer, and requires all sub-classes to implement logic for image management and time limits.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final String
    answer
    The correct text string representing the solution to the puzzle.

      The correct text string representing the solution to the puzzle.

  • Constructor Details

    • BasePuzzle

      public BasePuzzle(String answer)
      Constructs a new BasePuzzle with a predefined solution.
      Parameters:
      answer - The correct answer string for this puzzle.

  • Method Details

    • getAnswer

      public String getAnswer()
      Retrieves the correct answer for the puzzle.
      Returns:
      The answer string.

    • setPictureName

      public abstract void setPictureName(String pictureName)
      Assigns a specific picture file name to the puzzle's collection.
      Parameters:
      pictureName - The file name of the image to be added or set.

    • getPictureNames

      public abstract List<String> getPictureNames()
      Retrieves a list of all picture file names associated with this puzzle.
      Returns:
      A List of strings representing the image resource paths.

    • getTimeLimit

      public abstract int getTimeLimit()
      Retrieves the time duration allocated for players to solve this specific puzzle.
      Returns:
      The time limit in seconds.
